dataDrivenTest.name: Personalised AI Profiling
dataDrivenTest.description: This test uses travel related personalised AI profiling questions to simulate users answering questions for training a personal travel recommendations AI model . It includes multiple-choice questions, user responses, and follow-up questions.

questions.title: Preferred Trip Pace
questions.question: When I travel, what pace do I usually enjoy most?
options: Balanced mix of activities and rest
Flexible and decided day by day

answers.question: When I travel, what pace do I usually enjoy most?
answers.selectedOption: Flexible plan decided day by day

answers.question: When I am traveling, which pace do I typically prefer?
answers.selectedOption: Relaxed pace with plenty of downtime

answers.question: Which travel pace do I generally enjoy the most?
answers.selectedOption: A relaxed trip with lots of downtime

answers.question: What kind of trip pace do I usually like best?
answers.selectedOption: Keep plans flexible and decide each day

answers.question: When planning a trip, what pace suits me most?
What pace do I normally prefer while traveling?
Which pace feels best for me during travel?
During trips, what pace do I tend to enjoy?
answers.selectedOption: Action-packed trip with lots of highlights

answers.question: What is my usual preferred pace when I travel?
What travel tempo do I most often enjoy?
Which pace of travel is usually my favorite?
answers.selectedOption: Flexible itinerary shaped day by day

answers.question: When on a trip, what pacing do I like most?
answers.selectedOption: Relaxed pace with plenty of downtime

answers.question: What trip pacing style do I typically choose?
answers.selectedOption: Full schedule focused on major highlights

answers.question: What pace tends to work best for me when traveling?
answers.selectedOption: Balanced pace with activities and rest

answers.question: Which pace do I lean toward most on trips?
answers.selectedOption: Mix of activities with enough rest

answers.question: How fast or relaxed do I usually like to travel?
What level of trip pace do I usually prefer?
What travel rhythm do I generally enjoy most?
answers.selectedOption: A relaxed trip with lots of downtime

answers.question: When I am away, what pace do I prefer overall?
answers.selectedOption: Action-packed trip with lots of highlights

answers.question: What pace of travel do I most consistently enjoy?
answers.selectedOption: Even balance of sightseeing and rest
